title: Fix tickflow-dashboard unresponsive TUI input
description: Starting /tickflow-dashboard opens a custom TUI where keyboard input does not close or navigate. Esc and Ctrl-C should close the dashboard; arrows/vim keys should navigate; rendered lines should stay within terminal width.
closed_reason: Fixed tickflow-dashboard key handling to use pi-tui matchesKey for normalized keys, added Ctrl-C/q emergency exit, and truncated render lines to terminal width.
